violations.text: Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of soil residue and biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized, and bagged ice will be used until that is completed. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2025
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2025

The area beneath the 3 bay sink near the grease trap is in poor repair, impacting its ability to be cleaned. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/24/2025
No person in charge was present as needed at the time of inspection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Food safety managers linked to this establishment have all expired or no longer work at this facility. New Violation. Correct By: 03/14/2024
Ice bucket not stored inverted. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: donut storage cabinet kitchen cart latte pitcher bin grease trap container Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2024

The floors have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris, especially near the back outside door. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2024
No person in charge was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Food safety managers linked to this establishment have all expired or no longer work at this facility. The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 03/14/2024
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. English Responding to Vomiting and Diarrhea Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2024
The hand-washing sink in the front service area was lacking paper towels. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2024

Per interview of staff, blender bowl for Oasis machine are only washed, rinsed, and sanitized at the end of the day. The surfaces of equipment that contacts time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as meats and cheeses must be washed, rinsed, and sanitized at least every four hours. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2024
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2024
Ice buckets observed not stored inverted. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2024

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in bins in the front service area. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2024
Numerous plastic food containers observed not in good repair, cracked with edges missing. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonia sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: ice bucket donut storage cabinet prep table containers & lids on prep table plastic lid storage bins donut display case The grease trap container had an accumulation of drainage from the grease trap. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2024

The floors especially in the walk in cooler, and in the storage area near the kitchen door have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2024

The wall in the front service area is in poor repair, with several tiles missing. The cabinets in the front service area are in poor repair, with the laminate peeling off. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2024

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored on dry storage rack. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2024
